'''''Betar''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was scheduled to rendezvous with the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Warrior (Star Destroyer)|''Warrior'']], carrying a cargo of war matériel. Two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], however, disabled it. Then [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot [[Halley Kadorto]] destroyed the freighter afterward to prevent the weapons being used for any future battles.

{{Ship-stub}}
